stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
The landscape in the figure attached is to be used as a reference point on a VFR flight in winter with low clouds. Which of the following statements is correct?

options.a: The structure provides a good reference point.
options.b: The pilot should climb to gain a better visual picture of their surroundings.
options.c: This reference point could easily merge with the snow-covered terrain.
options.d: The area would be unidentifiable with snowfall and low clouds.
